summary:
The epidural venous plexus is located in the extradural space of the vertebral canal, specifically below the dura mater, where it forms a network of valves-free veins involved in venous drainage from the spine and surrounding tissues. This anatomically accurate description confirms option C.  

$\boxed{\text{C}}$
formatted_summary:
agent1 (Round 1 summarized): The epidural venous plexus is located in the extradural space of the vertebral canal, specifically below the dura mater, where it forms a network of valves-free veins involved in venous drainage from the spine and surrounding tissues. This anatomically accurate description confirms option C.  

$\boxed{\text{C}}$. Answer choice: C
